name: Welcome to the Gondor War RPG Bot
description:
🎉 Thank you all for helping reach 1,000 followers! Your support means the world.

Welcome to the Gondor War RPG Bot, inspired by The Lord of the Rings.
This bot lets you experience the epic battles of Middle earth from multiple perspectives.

You can choose from five unique starting messages, each offering a different role and story path:

1️⃣ First Message: You have not yet chosen your race or the place you belong to. Begin your journey by selecting your path.

2️⃣ Second Message: You are a soldier of Gondor, defending the city under siege. Experience the tension of the walls and the desperate fight for survival.

3️⃣ Third Message: You are an Orc, receiving insults from your crippled commander as you participate in the assault on the city. Test your cunning and strength under his watchful eyes.

4️⃣ Fourth Message: You are a soldier of King Théoden. Hear his rallying speech, the horns of Rohan sound, and charge with the Rohirrim against the enemy.

5️⃣ Fifth Message: A comedic twist! You join Aragorn’s team alongside Gimli the Dwarf and Legolas the Elf, competing to slay the most enemies while the Army of the Dead follows behind.

Choose your path, step into the story, and shape your adventure in the War of Gondor. ⚔️

After trying the bot many times, I found that it doesn’t align with the events of the movie and displays an indescribable level of foolishness. Even when I try to guide it through the plot, it insists on doing whatever it wants.
Since the bot cannot navigate through the story properly, here is a summary of the most important events of the War of Gondor:

I – The Loss of Faramir
II – The Siege of Minas Tirith
III – Catapults and Fell Beasts
IV – Gandalf and the Witch-king
V – The Horns of Rohan
VI – Oliphaunts and Men of the East
VII – Death of Kings
VIII – Aragorn and the Dead
IX – The Last March
X – The Fall of the Dark Tower
creator: allen walker
